heartbeat.description: Memory maintenance — consolidate session log to long-term memory, decay stale entries, reinforce active ones

code-exec.description: Universal MCP connector — discover, call, and orchestrate enterprise tools with progressive disclosure

tunnel.description: Expose local ports over the internet via Microsoft Dev Tunnels with tenant or anonymous access

microui.description: Lightweight native WebView windows — cross-platform micro-UI over JSON Lines (WebView2/WKWebView/WebKitGTK)

copilot-extension.description: SDK reference for building and debugging Copilot CLI extensions

new-mind.description: Bootstrap new minds — self-contained, no parent dependency

agent-comms.description: Inter-agent communication — scaffold contact skills with async-default messaging, jobs.json tracking, and --check for result retrieval

library.description: Fleet library — lateral skill sharing between agents via a shared private GitHub repo

generate-agent.description: Generate a Copilot CLI agent with a distinct personality — produces agent file + soul file at repo or user scope
